article_title: How Aldi is taking on US supermarkets with its $4 almond butter

tasks.prompt: What is the article mainly analyzing?
options: How Aldi uses low prices and a distinctive business model to compete with US supermarkets
Why almond farming has ended in the United States
How US supermarkets are leaving the grocery market
Why Aldi plans to stop selling private-label products
tasks.correct_answer: How Aldi uses low prices and a distinctive business model to compete with US supermarkets
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה מנתחת כיצד Aldi מתחרה ברשתות אמריקאיות באמצעות מחירים נמוכים ומודל תפעולי יעיל.

tasks.prompt: Which product and price are highlighted in the headline?
options: $4 almond butter
$14 olive oil
$40 coffee beans
$2 frozen pizza
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכותרת מדגישה חמאת שקדים במחיר של 4 דולרים כדוגמה להצעת הערך של Aldi.

tasks.prompt: In the article, what does Aldi’s retail “footprint” refer to?
options: The scale of its store presence in a market
The physical size of one customer’s shoe
The environmental impact of almond butter only
The design printed on its shopping bags
tasks.correct_answer: The scale of its store presence in a market
tasks.explanation_hebrew: “Retail footprint” מתייחס להיקף הנוכחות של הרשת בשוק, למשל מספר החנויות והאזורים שבהם היא פועלת.

tasks.prompt: How can low overheads help Aldi compete on price?
options: They reduce operating costs and allow lower shelf prices
They force the company to sell only luxury products
They increase congestion around every store
They require Aldi to rely entirely on national brands
tasks.correct_answer: They reduce operating costs and allow lower shelf prices
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הוצאות תקורה נמוכות מאפשרות לרשת לשמור על מחירים נמוכים יותר.

tasks.prompt: Why can a strong reliance on own-brand products support Aldi’s strategy? Answer in 2–4 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה לקשר בין מותגים פרטיים, שליטה בעלויות, מבחר מצומצם ומחירים נמוכים.
expected_points: Own brands can give Aldi more control over sourcing and pricing
A smaller curated range can simplify operations
Lower costs can be passed on through cheaper prices

tasks.prompt: What business forces have helped discount grocers gain attention in the United States? Answer in 2–4 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להסתמך על נושאי הכתבה, כגון אינפלציה מתמשכת, לחץ על תקציבי משקי הבית ושינוי בתפיסת הצרכנים.
expected_points: Persistent inflation has pressured household budgets
Consumers have become more willing to try discount stores
Improved perceptions of quality can support expansion

tasks.prompt: What does “curated” suggest about Aldi’s product range?
options: It is deliberately selected rather than extremely broad
It changes randomly every hour
It consists only of imported luxury goods
It is identical to every conventional supermarket range
tasks.correct_answer: It is deliberately selected rather than extremely broad
tasks.explanation_hebrew: “Curated” מצביע על מבחר שנבחר בקפידה ולא על מגוון עצום של מוצרים.

tasks.prompt: Write an 80–110 word summary of the article without copying sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: הסיכום צריך להסביר כיצד Aldi מתרחבת ומתחרה בארה״ב, ולכלול מחיר, מודל תפעולי, מותגים פרטיים ושינויים בהתנהגות הצרכנים.
expected_points: Aldi is expanding its US presence
Low-priced products such as $4 almond butter illustrate its appeal
Efficiency, automation, limited selection, and own brands help reduce costs
Inflation and changing consumer perceptions have supported its rise
The company still faces structural or market constraints

tasks.prompt: Write 3–5 sentences evaluating whether Aldi’s low-cost model is easy for conventional US supermarkets to copy.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להציג טענה מנומקת ולהתייחס לפחות לשני גורמים תפעוליים או שיווקיים מהכתבה.
expected_points: Mention factors such as store format, own brands, automation, overheads, or supply chains
Explain why established supermarkets may face structural constraints

tasks.prompt: Choose one detail that best explains Aldi’s ascent in the US market and defend your choice in 3–5 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לבחור פרט מרכזי מהכתבה ולהסביר כיצד הוא תורם לעלייה של Aldi בשוק האמריקאי.
expected_points: Choose a relevant detail such as low prices, inflation, expansion, own brands, or low overheads
Connect the detail to customer behavior or competitive advantage
Support the choice with clear reasoning
